description: A highly advanced Flutter-based mobile application acting as a companion interface for the NovaCare assistive rover project. Designed meticulously for users with disabilities, it provides manual rover controls, real-time health telemetry, autonomous AI features, and medical companionship.

tech_stack.ai_and_robotics_integrations: WebRTC, ROS Web Video Server, BlazePose/YOLOv8 (Vision), Local LLMs, STT/TTS (Voice), Sign Language Recognition

state_management_providers.name: SettingsProvider
state_management_providers.description: Handles app-wide configurations such as theme (Light/Dark/High Contrast), localization (English/Arabic), user profiles, and Caregiver/Guardian access linking.

state_management_providers.name: RoverProvider
state_management_providers.description: Manages rover telemetry data (Battery, Heart Rate, Location, Temp, LiDAR proximity) and dispatches commands (Manual Movement, Auto-Dock, Follow Me).

state_management_providers.name: BleProvider
state_management_providers.description: Handles BLE scanning, connection state, and interaction with ESP32 services.

communication_layers.ble: Short-range, low-latency command execution and real-time telemetry from ESP32.
communication_layers.firebase: Long-range command execution, persistent telemetry, alerts, and guardian access sync.
communication_layers.ros_webrtc: Live camera feed streaming for visual assistance and object detection.

ui_ux_accessibility: Strict WCAG AAA color contrast compliance.
72px minimum touch target size for all interactive elements.
Dynamic font scaling and full RTL support for Arabic layout.
Voice feedback toggles for visually impaired users.
telemetry_and_controls: Real-time vital and rover monitoring: Heart Rate, Battery, Location, Temp.
Dedicated Rover Controls screen with a directional pad, speed, power, and obstacle/LiDAR proximity alerts.
emergency_and_health: SOS Emergency trigger that sounds an alarm and notifies linked caregivers.
Medication Request and scheduling (Reminders screen synced via Firebase).
Safety Critical Background Loop utilizing BlazePose/YOLOv8 for fall and hazard detection alerts.
ai_companionship_and_vision: Dedicated Medical & Companionship LLM Chat Interface supporting Text, Voice (STT), and Sign Language inputs.
Visual Assistance features like 'Describe Scene' and 'Read Text' using live camera feeds with YOLOv8 overlays.

folder_structure.lib/screens/: Application screens (Home, Controls, Reminders, Alerts, Settings, Chat)
folder_structure.lib/services/: Wrappers for external hardware/network (BLE, Firebase, WebRTC/ROS)
folder_structure.lib/widgets/: Reusable components (action buttons, telemetry cards, live feed overlays)
